name: Asparagus with Roasted Yellow Bell Pepper Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Char the yellow bell peppers over a gas flame or in the broiler until blackened on all sides.
2. Wrap the peppers in a paper bag and let stand for 10 minutes. Peel, seed, and chop them.
3. Place the chopped peppers and 1/4 cup olive oil in a blender and puree until smooth.
4. Add the lemon juice and blend again until smooth. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Cook the asparagus in a large pot of boiling water until crisp-tender (about 4 minutes). Drain thoroughly.
6. Transfer the asparagus to a bowl of ice water; cool, then drain well.
(The sauce and asparagus can be prepared up to 6 hours ahead. Cover and let stand at room temperature.)
7. Toss the cooled asparagus with the remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Arrange the asparagus on a platter. Spoon some of the sauce over the asparagus.
9. Serve, passing the remaining sauce separately.
